name: Telegram Channel
description: Telegram Bot API channel adapter - long polling, DMs and group topics

configSchema.description: Telegram Bot API token from @BotFather. Required for all operations.
BotNexus agent ID this bot routes messages to.
Webhook URL for webhook mode. When absent, the adapter uses long polling.
Flush interval in milliseconds for buffered streaming deltas.
Maximum Telegram message length before payload splitting. Conservative default stays below Telegram's 4096-byte limit.
